734 GG0170L3_WLKG_UNEVEN_END_CD GG0170L3_WLKG_UNEVEN_END_CD GG0170L3 Wlkg Uneven End Indicaty to CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to walk 10 feet on uneven or sloping surfaces (indoor or outdoor), such as turf or gravel at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate
